problems.title: Array Sum
problems.description: Return the sum of all integers in the array.
constraints: nums is a non-empty array of integers

problems.title: Count Even Numbers
problems.description: Count how many values in the array are even.

problems.title: Maximum Value
problems.description: Return the largest value in the array.

problems.title: Minimum Value
problems.description: Return the smallest value in the array.

problems.title: Reverse Array
problems.description: Return a new array with the elements in reverse order.

problems.title: Contains Target
problems.description: Return true if target exists in the array, otherwise false.

problems.title: First Index Of Target
problems.description: Return the first index of target in the array, or -1 if not found.

problems.title: Count Target Occurrences
problems.description: Return how many times target appears in the array.

problems.title: Find Last Element
problems.description: Return the last element of the array. Return null for an empty array.

problems.title: Second Largest Distinct
problems.description: Return the second largest distinct number in the array. Return null if it does not exist.

problems.title: Remove Target Values
problems.description: Return a new array with all occurrences of target removed.

problems.title: Move Zeroes To End
problems.description: Return a new array with all zeroes moved to the end while keeping the order of non-zero values.

problems.title: Sorted Squares
problems.description: Given a sorted array of integers, return an array of their squares in sorted order.

problems.title: Palindrome String
problems.description: Return true if the given string reads the same forward and backward.

problems.title: Count Vowels
problems.description: Count lowercase vowels a, e, i, o, u in the string.

problems.title: Reverse String
problems.description: Return the reversed string.

problems.title: Title Case Words
problems.description: Capitalize the first letter of each space-separated word.
constraints: assume words are lowercase letters separated by single spaces

problems.title: Remove Spaces
problems.description: Return the string with all spaces removed.

problems.title: Longest Word Length
problems.description: Return the length of the longest word in a space-separated sentence.

problems.title: Count Digits In String
problems.description: Count how many characters in the string are digits.

problems.title: String Starts With
problems.description: Return true if s starts with prefix.

problems.title: String Ends With
problems.description: Return true if s ends with suffix.

problems.title: Unique Character Count
problems.description: Return the number of distinct characters in the string.

problems.title: Frequency Of Character
problems.description: Return how many times ch appears in s.

problems.title: Valid Anagram
problems.description: Return true if two strings are anagrams of each other.

problems.title: Find Missing Number
problems.description: The array contains distinct numbers from 0 to n with one missing. Return the missing number.

problems.title: Fizz Buzz
problems.description: Return an array of strings from 1 to n using Fizz for multiples of 3, Buzz for multiples of 5, and FizzBuzz for both.

problems.title: Is Prime
problems.description: Return true if n is a prime number.

problems.title: Greatest Common Divisor
problems.description: Return the greatest common divisor of a and b.

problems.title: Power Of Two
problems.description: Return true if n is a power of two.

problems.title: Factorial
problems.description: Return n factorial.

problems.title: Sum Of Digits
problems.description: Return the sum of digits of a non-negative integer.

problems.title: Binary Search Insert Position
problems.description: Given a sorted array and a target, return the index if found, otherwise the index where it should be inserted.

problems.title: First Negative Index
problems.description: Return the first index containing a negative number, or -1 if none exists.

problems.title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
problems.description: Merge two sorted arrays into one sorted array.

problems.title: Intersection Of Two Arrays Unique
problems.description: Return the unique intersection of two arrays in sorted order.

problems.title: Count Positive Numbers
problems.description: Count how many numbers are strictly greater than zero.

problems.title: Adjacent Difference Array
problems.description: Return an array of absolute differences between adjacent elements.

problems.title: Running Sum
problems.description: Return the running sum of the array.

problems.title: Clamp Value
problems.description: Clamp value x to the inclusive range [low, high].

problems.title: Count Words
problems.description: Return the number of words separated by single spaces. Empty string has 0 words.

problems.title: Alternate Case Merge
problems.description: Given two equal-length strings, return a new string by taking one char from a then one from b.

problems.title: Remove Duplicates Keep First
problems.description: Return a new array keeping only the first occurrence of each value.

problems.title: Smallest String Lexicographically
problems.description: Return the lexicographically smallest string from the array. Return null if empty.

problems.title: Majority Element Simple
problems.description: Return the value that appears more than n/2 times. Assume it always exists.

problems.title: Balanced Parentheses Basic
problems.description: Return true if the string containing only '(' and ')' is balanced.

problems.title: Queue Peek After Pushes
problems.description: Return the front value after enqueuing all numbers. Return null if nums is empty.

problems.title: Stack Top After Pushes
problems.description: Return the top value after pushing all numbers. Return null if nums is empty.

problems.title: Count Down List
problems.description: Return an array counting down from n to 1. Return [] for n <= 0.

problems.title: Average Of Integers Floor
problems.description: Return the floor of the average of the numbers. Return null for an empty array.

problems.title: Two Sum Indices
problems.description: Return the indices of the two numbers whose sum equals target. Assume exactly one answer exists and return indices in ascending order.

problems.title: Best Time To Buy And Sell Once
problems.description: Return the maximum profit from one buy and one sell. Return 0 if no profit is possible.

problems.title: Product Except Self Basic
problems.description: Return an array where each element is the product of all other elements without using division.

problems.title: Rotate Array Right
problems.description: Rotate the array to the right by k steps and return the new array.

problems.title: Group By Parity
problems.description: Return a new array with all even numbers first, then all odd numbers, preserving relative order within each group.

problems.title: Longest Consecutive Streak Sorted
problems.description: Given a sorted array, return the length of the longest streak of consecutive increasing integers.

problems.title: Subarray Sum Equals Target Count
problems.description: Return the count of contiguous subarrays whose sum equals k.

problems.title: Longest Substring Without Repeat
problems.description: Return the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

problems.title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
problems.description: Return the minimum length of a contiguous subarray with sum at least target. Return 0 if none exists.

problems.title: Max Consecutive Ones With One Flip
problems.description: Given a binary array, return the maximum number of consecutive 1s if you can flip at most one 0.

problems.title: Valid Parentheses Mixed
problems.description: Return true if the string containing (), [], and {} is valid.

problems.title: Evaluate Postfix Expression
problems.description: Evaluate the postfix expression tokens with +, -, *, /. Division truncates toward zero.

problems.title: Daily Temperatures Wait
problems.description: For each day, return how many days until a warmer temperature. If none, return 0.

problems.title: Next Greater Element Circular
problems.description: For each element in a circular array, return the next greater element, or -1 if none exists.

problems.title: Top K Frequent Elements
problems.description: Return the k most frequent elements. If frequencies tie, smaller number comes first in the result.

problems.title: Kth Largest Element
problems.description: Return the kth largest element in the array.

problems.title: Merge Intervals Basic
problems.description: Merge all overlapping intervals and return the result sorted by start.

problems.title: Insert Interval
problems.description: Insert a new interval into a sorted non-overlapping list of intervals and merge if necessary.

problems.title: Binary Search Matrix
problems.description: Return true if target exists in the matrix where each row is sorted and first element of each row is greater than last of previous row.

problems.title: Search Rotated Sorted Array
problems.description: Return the index of target in a rotated sorted array, or -1 if not found.

problems.title: Find Peak Element
problems.description: Return any index of a peak element where nums[i] is greater than its neighbors.

problems.title: Find First And Last Position
problems.description: Return the starting and ending index of target in a sorted array, or [-1,-1] if not found.

problems.title: Minimum In Rotated Sorted Array
problems.description: Return the minimum element in a rotated sorted array without duplicates.

problems.title: Number Of Islands
problems.description: Given a grid of '1' and '0', return the number of islands using 4-directional adjacency.

problems.title: Max Area Of Island
problems.description: Return the size of the largest island of 1s in a binary grid.

problems.title: Flood Fill
problems.description: Recolor the starting pixel and all 4-directionally connected pixels with the same original color.

problems.title: Rotting Oranges
problems.description: Return minutes until all fresh oranges become rotten. Return -1 if impossible.

problems.title: Course Schedule Possible
problems.description: Return true if you can finish all courses given prerequisite pairs [a,b] meaning b must be taken before a.

problems.title: Clone Graph Values BFS
problems.description: Given adjacency list of an undirected graph labeled 0..n-1, return a deep-cloned adjacency list sorted within each list.

problems.title: Level Order Traversal
problems.description: Given a binary tree in array form using nulls, return level order traversal as nested arrays.

problems.title: Maximum Depth Binary Tree
problems.description: Return the maximum depth of a binary tree in array form using nulls.

problems.title: Invert Binary Tree Array
problems.description: Invert a binary tree represented as an array and return the resulting array trimmed of trailing nulls.

problems.title: Diameter Of Binary Tree
problems.description: Return the diameter of the binary tree: the number of edges on the longest path between any two nodes.

problems.title: Path Sum Exists
problems.description: Return true if the binary tree has a root-to-leaf path whose sum equals targetSum.

problems.title: Lowest Common Ancestor BST
problems.description: Given a BST in array form and values p and q, return the lowest common ancestor value.

problems.title: Coin Change Minimum
problems.description: Return the minimum number of coins needed to make amount. Return -1 if impossible.

problems.title: House Robber Linear
problems.description: Return the maximum amount you can rob without robbing adjacent houses.

problems.title: Climbing Stairs Ways
problems.description: You can climb 1 or 2 steps. Return the number of distinct ways to reach step n.

problems.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence Length
problems.description: Return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

problems.title: Decode Ways Count
problems.description: A string of digits maps 1->A to 26->Z. Return number of ways to decode it.

problems.title: Word Break Possible
problems.description: Return true if the string can be segmented into one or more words from wordDict.

problems.title: Unique Paths Grid
problems.description: Return the number of unique paths from top-left to bottom-right in an m by n grid moving only down or right.

problems.title: Can Jump To End
problems.description: Return true if you can reach the last index.

problems.title: Partition Labels
problems.description: Partition the string into as many parts as possible so each letter appears in at most one part. Return the part lengths.

problems.title: Gas Station Start
problems.description: Return the starting gas station index if you can travel around the circuit once, else -1.

problems.title: Container With Most Water
problems.description: Return the maximum area of water a container can store.

problems.title: Three Sum Zero
problems.description: Return all unique triplets [a,b,c] such that a+b+c=0, sorted within each triplet and overall.

problems.title: Sort Colors Dutch Flag
problems.description: Sort an array containing only 0, 1, and 2 in-place conceptually and return it.

problems.title: Minimum Window Simple
problems.description: Return the minimum window substring of s containing all characters of t. Return empty string if none exists.

problems.title: Custom Sort By Order
problems.description: Sort characters in s so that chars appearing in order string come first in that order; other chars follow in original relative order.

problems.title: Median Of Two Sorted Arrays
problems.description: Given two sorted arrays, return the median of the combined sorted array in O(log(m+n)) target complexity.

problems.title: Trapping Rain Water
problems.description: Given an elevation map, return how much rain water can be trapped after raining.

problems.title: Largest Rectangle In Histogram
problems.description: Return the area of the largest rectangle in the histogram.

problems.title: Sliding Window Maximum
problems.description: Return the maximum value in each sliding window of size k.

problems.title: Minimum Window Subsequence
problems.description: Return the shortest substring of s where t appears as a subsequence. Return empty string if none exists.

problems.title: Word Ladder Length
problems.description: Return the length of the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord by changing one letter at a time.

problems.title: Word Search Board
problems.description: Return true if the word exists in the grid by sequentially adjacent cells, without reusing a cell.

problems.title: N Queens Count
problems.description: Return the number of distinct valid ways to place n queens on an n x n board.

problems.title: Sudoku Valid Fill
problems.description: Return true if the partially filled 9x9 Sudoku board is valid.

problems.title: Regular Expression Matching
problems.description: Implement regex matching with support for '.' and '*' where match must cover the entire string.

problems.title: Wildcard Matching
problems.description: Implement wildcard matching with support for '?' and '*' where '*' matches any sequence.

problems.title: Edit Distance
problems.description: Return the minimum number of insertions, deletions, and replacements to convert word1 into word2.

problems.title: Distinct Subsequences Count
problems.description: Return how many distinct subsequences of s equal t.

problems.title: Longest Valid Parentheses
problems.description: Return the length of the longest valid parentheses substring.

problems.title: Serialize Deserialize Binary Tree Compact
problems.description: Given a binary tree array, return its preorder serialization with null markers, then reconstruct and return the trimmed array. Output should be an object with serialized and rebuilt.

problems.title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
problems.description: Return the maximum path sum of any non-empty path in the binary tree.

problems.title: Recover BST Swapped Values
problems.description: Two nodes in a BST are swapped. Return the two values that should be swapped back in ascending order.

problems.title: Lowest Common Ancestor Binary Tree
problems.description: Given a binary tree array and node values p and q, return their lowest common ancestor value.

problems.title: All Nodes Distance K
problems.description: Return all node values at distance k from target in the binary tree, sorted ascending.

problems.title: Merge K Sorted Lists Arrays
problems.description: Given an array of sorted arrays, merge them into one sorted array.

problems.title: Find Kth Smallest In Matrix
problems.description: Given an n x n matrix where rows and columns are sorted, return the kth smallest element.

problems.title: Median Finder Stream
problems.description: Process a stream of numbers and return the median after each insertion.

problems.title: Skyline Critical Points
problems.description: Given buildings as [left,right,height], return the skyline critical points.

problems.title: Alien Dictionary Order
problems.description: Given sorted words in an alien language, return one valid character order string. Return empty string if invalid.

problems.title: Network Delay Time
problems.description: Return the time it takes for all nodes to receive a signal sent from k. Return -1 if unreachable.

problems.title: Cheapest Flight Within K Stops
problems.description: Return the cheapest price from src to dst with at most k stops, or -1 if impossible.
problems.functionSignature: function cheapestFlightWithinKStops(n, flights, src, dst, k)

problems.title: Find Itinerary Lexicographic
problems.description: Given airline tickets [from,to], reconstruct itinerary starting at JFK using all tickets once and choose lexical order when multiple answers exist.

problems.title: Swim In Rising Water
problems.description: Return the minimum time required to travel from top-left to bottom-right where time must be at least the max elevation seen on the path.

problems.title: Shortest Bridge
problems.description: Given a binary grid with exactly two islands, return the smallest number of 0s to flip to connect them.

problems.title: Critical Connections Bridges
problems.description: Return all critical connections in the network sorted ascending by pair then overall.

problems.title: Longest Increasing Path Matrix
problems.description: Return the length of the longest strictly increasing path in the matrix moving 4 directions.

problems.title: Burst Balloons Max Coins
problems.description: Return the maximum coins you can collect by bursting balloons wisely.

problems.title: Palindrome Partition Minimum Cuts
problems.description: Return the minimum cuts needed to partition the string into palindromic substrings.

problems.title: Interleaving String
problems.description: Return true if s3 is formed by interleaving s1 and s2 while preserving character order in each.

problems.title: Maximal Rectangle Binary Matrix
problems.description: Return the area of the largest rectangle containing only 1s in a binary matrix.

problems.title: Russian Doll Envelopes
problems.description: Return the maximum number of envelopes you can Russian doll.

problems.title: Split Array Largest Sum
problems.description: Split nums into k non-empty subarrays minimizing the largest subarray sum. Return that minimum largest sum.

problems.title: Count Smaller Numbers After Self
problems.description: Return an array where each element is the count of smaller numbers to its right.

problems.title: Reverse Pairs Count
problems.description: Return the number of reverse pairs (i,j) such that i<j and nums[i] > 2*nums[j].

problems.title: Create Maximum Number
problems.description: Given two arrays of digits and k, create the maximum number of length k while preserving order within each array.

problems.title: Candy Distribution
problems.description: Children with higher rating than neighbors must get more candy. Return the minimum candies needed.

problems.title: First Missing Positive
problems.description: Return the smallest missing positive integer.

problems.title: Substring Concatenation All Words
problems.description: Return all starting indices where the substring is a concatenation of each word in words exactly once.

problems.title: Minimum Number Of Refueling Stops
problems.description: Return the minimum number of refueling stops to reach the target, or -1 if impossible.

problems.title: Max Points On A Line
problems.description: Given points, return the maximum number of points lying on the same straight line.

problems.title: Text Justification
problems.description: Fully justify text so each line has exactly maxWidth characters, except the last line which is left-justified.

problems.title: Minimum Cost To Connect Points
problems.description: Given points on a 2D plane, return the minimum cost to connect all points using Manhattan distance.

problems.title: Freedom Trail Steps
problems.description: Given ring and key, return the minimum steps to spell key by rotating the ring and pressing a button.

problems.title: Remove Invalid Parentheses Minimum
problems.description: Remove the minimum number of invalid parentheses to make the string valid. Return all possible results sorted ascending.

problems.title: Stickers To Spell Word
problems.description: Given stickers and a target, return the minimum number of stickers required to spell the target, or -1 if impossible.
